docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-19-2021 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JUN-23-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. CONTINUANCE NOTICE SENT TO ALL PARTIES.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-10-2021 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-23-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF THE COURT TO AUG-10-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF NICOLE TOBOR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NICKOLAS JUAREZ IS PRESENT. CASE TO BE HEARD WITH CASES 21-864019 & 21-864017. SERVICE ISSUES ARE WAIVED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-10-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-10-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG HEAR ALL THREE CASES TOGETHER: CSM-21-864017, CSM-21-864019 AND CSM-21-864020. PLAINTIFF NICOLE TOBOR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PRESTON UNAEGBU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NICKOLAS JUAREZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARY GARRETT IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY TOBOR, NICOLE AS TO DEFENDANT JUAREZ, NICKOLAS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-19-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-11-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT JUAREZ, NICKOLAS
